channel.title: oxHugo - Tag - My New Hugo Site
channel.description: oxHugo - Tag - My New Hugo Site

item.title: My First Post
item.description: Dummy First Post This is my first post body. I am excited.😎 😍 7 8 9 10 11 12 13 14 #include <stdio.h> //include info about standard library int main() // define a function named main that receives no // argument values. { printf("hello, world from Ox-Hugo\n"); //main calls library function printf } // to print the sequence of characters; // \n represents a newline character 1 (message "Hello World Cup") Latex Section \[ c = \pm\sqrt{a^2 + b^2} \]
